nodes.text:
Symptoms include anaemia, weight loss, abdominal discomfort and altered bowel habit for 9 weeks. Additional symptoms include fatigue. Past medical history significant for rheumatoid arthritis.

CT abdomen on 28/12/2024: caecal mass with multiple enlarged mesenteric nodes; no liver metastases. T2 N1 M0 EMVI –
